---
pagetitle: "Matthew Burns — Senior Data Scientist / ML Engineer"
page-layout: full
toc: false
link-external-icon: false
listing:
  - id: featured-projects
    contents:
      - "projects/amazon-sentiment-ml-eng/*.qmd"
      - "projects/steam-recommender/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    image-align: left
---

<div class="container py-5">

<div class="row align-items-center mb-5">
<div class="col-lg-8">

<h1 class="fw-bold mb-1">Matthew Burns</h1>
<p class="lead mb-3"><strong>Senior Data Scientist / ML Engineer</strong> &mdash; Supply Chain &amp; Logistics ML</p>

I build production ML systems that work outside the notebook &mdash; from end-to-end NLP pipelines on 130M-row datasets to collaborative filtering at scale. My background spans mechanical engineering, supply chain operations, and a Master&rsquo;s in Applied Data Science, giving me an edge on problems where domain knowledge and ML engineering depth both matter.

<div class="mt-4">
<a href="/projects/" class="btn btn-primary me-2">View Projects</a>
<a href="/about.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">About Me</a>
</div>

</div>
</div>

## Featured Projects

:::{#featured-projects}
:::

## About Me

From mechanical engineering to supply chain analytics to ML systems &mdash; my career has followed the data. I&rsquo;m currently finishing a Master&rsquo;s in Applied Data Science, applying rigorous methods to high-impact problems in forecasting, NLP, and optimization.

<div class="mt-3">
<a href="/about.qmd" class="me-3">More about me &rarr;</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/matthewsburns849/" class="me-3" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/msburns24/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
</a>
</div>

</div>
